3318130.name: Schoolteacher Simulator Demo
3318130.description:
Become a teacher in a local school.

Demo version consists of first day, so checking presence of students, making exam, finding cheater, monitoring school hall and singing contest and start of day 2 - bus trip to forest camp. You can explore school too. It lasts around 15 minutes

Demo Features:

  • Living school environment

  • Full first day

  • Few events like singing competition

  • Demo will be updated regularly till first day is fully polished
3318130.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
